app.markAsMainTooltip: Mark as main VM, this environment will be used for the AI chat assistant
app.isMainTooltip: This is your main VM (used for AI chat)

vmWizard.title: Add Environment
vmWizard.description: Connect a fresh VM over SSH. Orbion will probe, install, forward, and pair automatically.
vmWizard.name: Name
vmWizard.pickServicesDescription: Select which services to install and start on the VM. Services already running will be left untouched.
vmWizard.serviceLoopTaskDesc: Task runner and scheduler, required to manage loops
vmWizard.serviceGhDesc: GitHub CLI for repos, PRs, issues, optional
vmWizard.serviceAzDoDesc: Azure DevOps extension for az CLI, optional
vmWizard.serviceGitlabDesc: GitLab CLI for repos, MRs, issues, optional
vmWizard.serviceTerraformDesc: Infrastructure as Code by HashiCorp, optional
vmWizard.serviceTailscaleDesc: Mesh VPN for secure access, optional
vmWizard.setAsMainDesc: Use this environment for the AI chat assistant. Changing the main VM may lose the previous chat context.
vmWizard.setAsMainFirstDesc: This is your first environment, so it will be set as the main VM automatically.
vmWizard.securityNote: Make sure you can SSH into the target. We recommend using Tailscale or a private network. Never expose your environments to the public internet.
vmWizard.mainInvalidTarget: Invalid target "{target}". Use user@host format or a known SSH alias.
vmWizard.mainAlreadyExists: Environment "{name}" is already connected to this target. Remove it first or select it from the sidebar.
vmWizard.mainConsentNodeNotFound: Node.js not found on the VM. Install it via mise?
vmWizard.mainNodeNotFoundFinal: Node.js not found on the VM. Install Node 18+ before running the wizard.
vmWizard.mainInstallingMise: Installing mise and Node.js on the VM...
vmWizard.mainMiseFailed: Failed to install Node.js via mise.
vmWizard.mainMiseNodeStillMissing: mise installation completed but Node is still not reachable. Check the VM.
vmWizard.mainNodeStillNotFoundAfterMise: Node still not found after mise installation.
vmWizard.mainMiseUpgradeFailed: Failed to upgrade Node.js via mise.
vmWizard.mainMiseUpgradeStillMissing: mise upgrade completed but Node is still not reachable.
vmWizard.mainNodeStillNotFoundAfterUpgrade: Node still not found after mise upgrade.
vmWizard.mainFailedToStartServices: Failed to start services on the VM.
vmWizard.mainOpeningTunnel: Forwarding local port to daemon on :{port}…
vmWizard.mainNoPairingCode: Could not create pairing code on the remote daemon. The daemon may not support pairing-create yet.
vmWizard.mainSshAuthFailed: SSH authentication failed. Check your key or password.
vmWizard.mainNodeTooOld: Node {version} found, but {floor}+ is required. Update Node on the VM.
vmWizard.mainMiseInstallFailedNoOutput: mise install failed with no output
vmWizard.mainNodeNotFoundOnVm: Node.js not found on the VM. Install Node 18+ first.
vmWizard.mainInstallLoopTaskFailed: Failed to install loop-task on the VM. Check the remote log for details.
vmWizard.mainInstallOpenCodeFailed: Failed to install opencode on the VM. Check the remote log for details.
vmWizard.mainDaemonPortBusy: Port {port} is already in use by another process on the VM. The wizard will not restart a daemon it didn't start.
vmWizard.mainOpenCodePortBusy: Port {port} is already in use by another process on the VM.
vmWizard.mainTunnelAuthFailed: SSH tunnel auth failed. Check your key or password.
vmWizard.mainOpenCodeAuthLogin: Run `opencode auth login` on the VM to connect a provider
vmWizard.mainOpenCodeVersionTooOld: OpenCode server version {version} is below minimum {min}. Update OpenCode on the VM.
vmWizard.mainBaseUrlNotRegistered: Base URL not registered as an environment: {url}
vmWizard.mainNoEndpoint: Main VM has no active endpoint
vmWizard.mainTargetVmNoEndpoint: Target VM has no active endpoint

tasks.noTasksDescription: This environment has no reusable tasks yet.

projects.noProjectsDescription: This environment has no projects yet.

loops.cannotReach: Could not reach {url}. Is the loop-task daemon running?
loops.noLoopsDescription: This environment has no loops yet. Create one with the loop-task CLI or board.

instanceDetail.noProjectsDescription: This environment has no projects yet.

projectDetail.noLoopsDescription: This project has no loops yet.

infra.title: Infrastructure
infra.description: Ask about your fleet: machine status, clone repos, create issues, manage services.
infra.unreachable: Unable to reach the infrastructure runtime. Check that the main VM is connected.
infra.helpText:
I can help you with fleet operations. Try:
- machine-status: get the health of all VMs
- clone repo: clone a git repository on a VM
- create issue: file a new GitHub issue or ADO work item
- edit issue: update an existing issue's title, body, or labels
- detect-platform: identify a project's hosting platform from git remotes
- list issues / what's labeled X?: view a filtered slice of the backlog as compact cards

platformDetect.envIdRequired: environmentId is required for platform detection
platformDetect.noDirectory: No project directory provided — cannot detect platform. Specify a working directory.
platformDetect.platformDetected: Detected platform: **{platform}** (from {count} remote{count, plural, one {} other {s}})
platformDetect.platformUnknown: Could not determine the platform from git remotes. The repository may use an unsupported host.

issues.noPlatformCli: No platform CLI found. Install `gh` (GitHub CLI) or `az` (Azure CLI) to create issues from chat.
issues.ghNotAuth: GitHub CLI is not authenticated. Run `gh auth login` in a terminal first.
issues.azNotAuth: Azure CLI is not authenticated. Run `az login` in a terminal first.
issues.titleRequired: Issue title is required. Start with a short title on the first line.
issues.stackTitle: **{count} issue{count, plural, one {} other {s}}{label, select, false {} other { labeled {label}}}{state, select, all { (all)} closed { (closed)} other {}}:**
issues.stackTruncated: Showing {shown} of {total}. Refine your query to narrow results.
issues.stackEmpty: No issues found matching your query.

labels.ghRequiredForLabels: The GitHub CLI (`gh`) is required to add labels. Install and authenticate it first.
labels.issueNumberAndLabelsRequired: Issue number and labels are required.
labels.setPickupLabel: Pickup label for this project set to `{labels}`.
labels.clearedPickupLabel: Pickup label for this project cleared.
labels.noPickupLabel: No pickup label configured for this project. Use "set pickup label <name>" to configure one.

editIssue.issueNumberRequired: Issue number is required. Specify which issue to edit (e.g. "edit issue #42").
editIssue.noChanges: No changes specified. Tell me what to change: title, body, or labels.
editIssue.noPlatformCli: No platform CLI found. Install `gh` (GitHub CLI) or `az` (Azure CLI) to edit issues from chat.
editIssue.ghNotAuth: GitHub CLI is not authenticated. Run `gh auth login` in a terminal first.
editIssue.azNotAuth: Azure CLI is not authenticated. Run `az login` in a terminal first.
editIssue.adoLabelsNotSupported: Label operations are not supported for Azure DevOps via the CLI. You can edit the title and description, or manage labels in the web UI.
editIssue.ambiguousReference: I need a specific issue number to edit. Please provide one (e.g. "edit issue #42").

pickMainVm.title: Pick a new main VM
pickMainVm.description: The infrastructure assistant needs a main VM to run on. Choose one of your environments or skip to disable it.

chat.supervisedTitle: Agent asks before commands and file changes

fleetActivity.tooltip: {count} agent-loop runs today across the fleet

budget.title: Budget Watches
budget.description: Set run-volume thresholds and get notified when loops exceed them.
budget.autoPauseDescription: Automatically pause the loop when the threshold is exceeded. Resume anytime.
budget.noWatchesDescription: Add a watch to get notified when a loop exceeds a run-volume threshold.
budget.breachDescription: Loops that exceeded their run-volume threshold.
budget.breachNotification: {loopName} exceeded {threshold} runs/day ({count} runs){autoPause, select, true { — auto-paused} other {}}
budget.invalidThreshold: Threshold must be a positive number
budget.loopRequired: Loop ID is required for loop-scope watches
budget.environmentRequired: Environment is required for loop-scope watches

inbox.title: Inbox
inbox.emptyMessage: All clear! Ask a question about your fleet below.
